steps.title: Set the function to zero
steps.content: The $x$-intercepts occur where $y=0$, so set the factored function equal to $0$: $$(x+6)(x-7)=0$$

steps.title: Find the intercepts
steps.content: Set each factor equal to $0$: $$x+6=0\quad \text{or}\quad x-7=0$$ Thus $x=-6$ or $x=7$; these are separate values, not $-67$. The answer is -6,7.
